name: TestCaseSkipped
title: TestCaseSkipped
description: This function can be used to mark a test case as unexecuted. This will then appear as a "skipped" test case in the Test Report.The verdict of the test module is not affected. This function may only be called in the context of the MainTest function.

parameters.name: ident
parameters.description: Identifier of the test case, e.g. number.

description: test case "tc3" is only executed under certain conditions
